prompt: /answer-simple "<long draft с 12 микросервисами, gates, QPS, SRE>"

assertions.text: Service names (payments, billing, invoicing, analytics, reports, dashboards) NOT flagged as internal codes
v0.2.5 and gates flagged as project-specific codes
✨NEW Правило 5: general engineering vocab (staging, prod, QPS, SRE, planned downtime, rollback playbook) NOT flagged
✨NEW Правило 1 strict: exact numbers preserved (30 минут, 12 сервисов, 2 недели, 24 часа) — no 'примерно' added
✨NEW Правило 1 strict: no implicit predicates added (no 'появилась', 'возникла' etc.)
✨NEW Правило 4: consistency — if term decoded inline, finding phrased differently (not 'без расшифровки')
